name: iHeartRadio
description: iHeartRadio is a digital radio platform operated by iHeartMedia that provides access to over 800 live broadcast and digital-only radio stations from more than 150 U.S. cities, podcasts, artist-based custom stations, and curated music content.

itemListElement.name: iHeartRadio Catalog API
itemListElement.description: Search and discovery capabilities across the iHeartRadio content catalog, including live broadcast radio stations, digital-only stations, podcasts, artists, tracks, and playlists.

itemListElement.name: iHeartRadio Live Stations API
itemListElement.description: Access to live broadcast radio station information including station metadata, market information, genre classification, and streaming URLs across multiple formats.

itemListElement.name: iHeartRadio Podcasts API
itemListElement.description: Search and discovery of podcasts available on the iHeartRadio platform, along with retrieval of individual podcast episode listings and direct audio stream URLs.
